title: EATO Silicone Muffin Cupcake Cases, Reuseable Cake Moulds,Nonstick Baking Cups for Yorkshire Pudding Tray, Deep Cupcake Tin, Bun Pan, Air Fryer Liners Bakeware,24 Pack
features: Effortless Cleaning: Say goodbye to scrubbing! Our silicone cupcake molds are easy to clean, saving you valuable time and ensuring you spend more time savoring your delectable baked treats.

Ultimate Non-Stick Experience: Unlike traditional paper cake cups, our silicone muffin cases are ultra-flexible and provide a hassle-free way to remove your baked goods. No more struggling to peel off your cupcakes or muffins!

Versatile Baking Companion: Our silicone forms can handle temperatures up to 240°C, making them suitable for both baking and freezing. They seamlessly complement any standard muffin pan, expanding your baking possibilities.

Endless Culinary Creativity: EATO's durable silicone molds are incredibly versatile. Use them to craft individual muffins, truffles, egg bites, chocolates, jellies, tarts, jam-filled sponges, baked oatmeal cups, oversized ice cubes, Yorkshire puddings, and more. They also double as molds for soaps, bath bombs, candles, and wax melts, making them perfect for parties, weddings, birthdays, Halloween, Christmas gifts, and Thanksgiving celebrations.

Perfect for Every Occasion: Whether you're hosting a party, wedding, birthday bash, or holiday gathering, our multipurpose silicone molds are your go-to solution. Elevate your culinary creations and add a touch of elegance to any event with ease.
description: PURE SILICONE CUPS FOR BAKING PERFECTION Tired of smelly baking cups and the soapy-tasting food you get when you bake with them? Sick of standing there scrubbing those baking cups because your muffins stuck to them yet again? You deserve better than shoddy cheaply made silicone baking cups. Get odor-free and reusable baking goodness with our reusable silicone cupcake baking cups! Prepare pastry, breads, desserts and loads of other delicious foods. Watch your baked goods simply slide out of your new silicone bakeware - even without a spray of cooking oil! Looking for a present for a birthday, Christams , or wedding? Then look no further because of EATO cupcake cups make a fantastic gift idea for anybody who loves to bake delicious foods.EATOReusable Silicone Baking Cups are great for baking, treats, children’s snacks and lunches, sorting non-food items, wax melting, crafts and more! Save money and headaches by avoiding single-use paper liners and cleaning the nooks and crannies of a muffin tin. These non-toxic, BPA free, 100% food-grade silicone baking cups are easy to clean, microwave, dishwasher, freezer and oven safe (up to 445 °F)
